specialDismissal: Who, for our salvation, endured spitting, scourges, wounds, the cross, and death,
kontakia: (Tone 6) He who closed the depths of the sea* is be held wrapped in linen and embalmed with myrrh;* the Death less One is placed in a tomb like One who is dead.* The women came to embalm him, weeping bitterly and crying:* Be hold the Sabbath transcendent in blessings* in which Christ has slept and will rise on the third day
troparia: (Tone 2, self-podoben) The noble Joseph took Your most pure Body down from the Cross.* He wrapped it in a clean linen with aromatic spices* and sadly laid it in a new tomb.
